hooks.command: jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.file_path // empty" | tr -d '\r' | while IFS= read -r f; do case "$f" in *.go) gofmt -w "$f" 2>/dev/null;; esac; done

input=$(cat | tr -d '\r'); echo "$input" | jq -e '(.tool_name == "Bash") and (.tool_input.command | startswith("git push")) and (.tool_response.success == true)' >/dev/null 2>&1 && { sleep 25; branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\r' || echo "main"); summary=$(gh run list --branch "$branch" --limit 5 --json name,status,conclusion,headBranch 2>/dev/null | jq -r '[.[] | "\(.name)=\(.conclusion // .status)"] | join(", ")' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$summary" ]; then jq -nc --arg s "CI: $branch | $summary" '{"systemMessage":$s}'; fi; } || echo '{"continue":true}'

read -r input; cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); case "$cmd" in "git push"*) gosec ./... >/dev/null 2>&1; gosec_rc=$?; staticcheck ./... >/dev/null 2>&1; staticcheck_rc=$?; if [ $gosec_rc -ne 0 ] || [ $staticcheck_rc -ne 0 ]; then echo "{\"continue\":false,\"stopReason\":\"Security check failed: gosec=$gosec_rc staticcheck=$staticcheck_rc\",\"systemMessage\":\"Push blocked: security/static check failed\"}"; else echo "{\"continue\":true,\"systemMessage\":\"Security checks passed\"}"; fi;; *) echo "{\"continue\":true}";; esac
